message.content:
@startuml
title Update States

box "Wayside Controller" #lightgreen
participant TrackControllers
participant WaysideController
participant PLC
participant WaysideControllerGUI
end box

participant Simulator
participant TrackModel

Simulator -> TrackControllers : timeUpdate(SimTime)

loop waysideControllers
  TrackControllers -> WaysideController : updateStates()

  loop associatedBlocks
    WaysideController -> TrackControllers : receiveBlockInfo(line, blockId)
    WaysideController -> TrackModel : getBlockInfo(line, blockId)
    TrackModel --> WaysideController : Block
    WaysideController --> TrackControllers : Block

    WaysideController -> PLC : runPLC(occupancy)
    PLC -> PLC : getLogic()
    PLC --> PLC : String logic

    alt if(newState != currentState)
      WaysideController -> TrackControllers : transmitState(line, blockId, state)
      WaysideController -> TrackModel : setState(line, blockId, state)
      TrackModel --> WaysideController : Success
    end
  end

  alt if(Wayside Controller Selected)
    WaysideController -> WaysideControllerGUI : displayInfo()
    WaysideControllerGUI -> WaysideController : receiveBlockInfo(line, blockId)
    WaysideController -> TrackControllers : receiveBlockInfo(line, blockId)
    WaysideController -> TrackModel : getBlockInfo(line, blockId)
    TrackModel --> WaysideController : Block
    WaysideController --> TrackControllers : Block
    WaysideController --> WaysideControllerGUI : Block
  end
end

@enduml
